notes: Slide-29 rung 4 ablation: predict() returns benchmark_mean_acc[benchmark] with fallback to the global mean. NO subject signal, NO item text, NO MLP. The slide names 'benchmark + condition' together; train_modal.py only computes per-benchmark means so the condition side is folded in via the fallback. We expect this to collapse to the global mean on cold-start (held-out benchmarks fall through), making the contrast with subj_mean_lookup informative: it shows that for this competition's cold-start regime the SUBJECT side carries signal and the BENCHMARK side does not.
